ns0:entry.ns0:title: Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
Language: javascript
Uncensored, open-source alternative to Higgsfield AI, Freepik AI, Krea AI, Openart AI — Free, unrestricted AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ComposioHQ/open-claude-cowork
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ComposioHQ/open-claude-cowork
Language: javascript
Open Source version of Claude Cowork with 500+ SaaS app integrations

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EvoMap/evolver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EvoMap/evolver
Language: javascript
The GEP-powered self-evolving engine for AI agents. Auditable evolution with Genes, Capsules, and Events. | evomap.ai

ns0:entry.ns0:title: badlogic/pi-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/badlogic/pi-skills
Language: javascript
Skills for pi coding agent (compatible with Claude Code and Codex CLI)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coreyhaines31/marketingskills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coreyhaines31/marketingskills
Language: javascript
Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: decolua/9router
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/decolua/9router
Language: javascript
Connect All AI Code Tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Antigravity, Copilot, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, Cline, OpenClaw...) to 40+ AI Providers & 100+ Models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fspecii/ace-step-ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fspecii/ace-step-ui
Language: javascript
🎵 The Ultimate Open Source Suno Alternative - Professional UI for ACE-Step 1.5 AI Music Generation. Free, local, unlimited. Stop paying for Suno!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hotheadhacker/no-as-a-service
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hotheadhacker/no-as-a-service
Language: javascript
No-as-a-Service (NaaS) is a simple API that returns a random rejection reason. Use it when you need a realistic excuse, a fun “no,” or want to simulate being turned down in style.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jo-inc/camofox-browser
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jo-inc/camofox-browser
Language: javascript
Stealth headless browser for AI agents — bypass Cloudflare, bot detection, and anti-scraping. Drop-in Puppeteer/Playwright replacement.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: maboloshi/github-chinese
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/maboloshi/github-chinese
Language: javascript
GitHub 汉化插件，GitHub 中文化界面。 (GitHub Translation To Chinese)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pbakaus/impeccable
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pbakaus/impeccable
Language: javascript
The design language that makes your AI harness better at design.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: phaserjs/phaser
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/phaserjs/phaser
Language: javascript
Phaser is a fun, free and fast 2D game framework for making HTML5 games for desktop and mobile web browsers, supporting Canvas and WebGL rendering.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: songquanpeng/one-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/songquanpeng/one-api
Language: javascript
LLM API 管理 & 分发系统，支持 OpenAI、Azure、Anthropic Claude、Google Gemini、DeepSeek、字节豆包、ChatGLM、文心一言、讯飞星火、通义千问、360 智脑、腾讯混元等主流模型，统一 API 适配，可用于 key 管理与二次分发。单可执行文件，提供 Docker 镜像，一键部署，开箱即用。LLM API management & key redistribution system, unifying multiple providers under a single API. Single binary, Docker-ready, with an English UI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vava-nessa/free-coding-models
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vava-nessa/free-coding-models
Language: javascript
Find, benchmark and install in CLI 200+ FREE coding LLM models across 20+ providers in real time
